name: eval-enhancement-verification
description: Verifies multi-iteration accuracy, concurrency, and the new eval runner features. Direct-mode cases run against any MCP server. The mock stdio server returns structuredContent, so expectations use schema/response matching rather than containsText.

cases.description: Multi-iteration: 3 runs, all should pass. Verifies accuracy=1.0 and iterationResults has 3 entries. Echo tool returns structuredContent:{echo:message}.
Multi-iteration: 5 runs of a deterministic calculation (7+3=10). Accuracy should be 1.0. Calculate tool returns structuredContent:{result:10}.
Single-iteration baseline (no accuracy field expected). Verifies backward compatibility.
Multi-iteration: 3 runs with 100% accuracy threshold. This always passes since echo is deterministic.
